Patch Set 8:

> Patch Set 7:
> 
> When I open the xML in Draw.io (online) I get 3 tabs. does this work in read-the-dos too?

Draw io file is not accessible from rtd html page, only the generated png image is.
Draw io file is provided here as a source file, just to be able to update the generated image later on when needed.
